# Maintenance Planning and Scheduling: Protecting Your Equipment Investment Post-Commissioning

## 适用受众
Project_Manager

## 写作角度说明
设备的长期可靠性取决于科学的维护计划。本角度帮助项目经理解析维护计划的关键要素，确保设备在运行生命周期内保持最佳状态。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Preventive maintenance scheduling—based on actual usage patterns rather than generic recommendations—is the project manager's most impactful contribution to long-term equipment reliability.

## 参考素材
- Daily inspection items: visual seal condition, pressure reading, alarm log review
- Weekly maintenance: cleaning procedures, filter inspection, hardware tightness check
- Monthly maintenance: seal replacement assessment, calibration verification, spare parts inventory
- Annual maintenance: full system inspection, pressure decay retest, PLC firmware review
- Seal replacement intervals: pneumatic seals (3-5 years), mechanical seals (5-8 years)
- Calibration schedule: pressure sensors (annual), temperature sensors (per GMP requirement)
- Maintenance log requirements: documentation standards, retention periods, audit readiness

## 关键词
Preventive Maintenance, Maintenance Schedule, Seal Replacement, Calibration, Equipment Reliability, Maintenance Log
